title: RBI issues Final Amendment Directions on Revised Lending norms for UCBs
description: The Reserve Bank had, on February 10, 2026, issued draft Amendment Directions proposing review of lending norms for UCBs, seeking feedback from stakeholders. The draft Amendment Directions proposed, inter alia, to rationalise the definition of unsecured advances, enhance single and aggregate unsecured advances limits, enhance the lending limit to nominal members for purchase of consumer durables, and allow certain discretions to Tier 3 and Tier 4 UCBs with regard to housing loans.
